steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Fill in fraud control name: ControlNothing
Fill in fraud control config: suspicious
Fill in fraud control display name: DisplayNotAvailable
Verify that all the data are presented in the row
